programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates the murder of a journalist friend, following a trail of clues that leads to a cult obsessed with the splendour and savagery of ancient Rome. Drama, guest starring Peter Wyngarde and Ed Bishop(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A sailor is murdered shortly after arriving in the US from Greece, and Theo is convinced he smuggled something into the country - a stamp that is valuable enough to kill for(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The bodies of typhoid victims washed up by flood waters threaten to contaminate water supplies in Los Angeles, leaving Quincy fighting to avert a major health scare(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur becomes involved with a gambler, whose sudden death leaves the dodgy car dealer £2,000 worse off. Meanwhile, Terry helps his old flame Sylvie leave her abusive husband. Billy Connolly guest stars in the vintage comedy drama, alongside George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A crooked foreign diplomat helps arrange the theft of a consignment of silver bullion being transported through Tilbury docks. Bodie and Doyle are assigned to investigate, and it becomes apparent that they have a useful link to the villains via Doyle's girlfriend Deborah. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan persuades a villain to act as an informant providing evidence against his two accomplices. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman, and featuring an early screen appearance by Christopher Ellison(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as rugby player Shane Williams, Coronation Street's Sair Khan, comedian Milton Jones and former Paralympic athlete Tanni Grey-Thompson pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove visit the Classic Motor Show in Birmingham, before attempting to make a profit at the Malvern Autojumble(n)

programme.title: The Krays (1990)
programme.desc: Biopic of the infamous twin brothers who built up a criminal empire in the East End of London during the 1960s. Seizing territory from an already established rival by force, they quickly rose to prominence in the city's gangland culture. However, over time the brothers began to clash, while enemies stood ready to bring them down. Starring Gary and Martin Kemp, Billie Whitelaw and Tom Bell(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar is suspected of involvement in a series of jewel robberies on the French Riviera, and has to stay one step ahead of the police long enough to catch the real culprit. Guest starring Ronnie Barker and Aimee Delamain(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A woman whom Theo had helped to kick a drug habit seemingly commits suicide, but the detective is convinced she was murdered. Guest starring John Glover (Smallville)(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: After a jet liner crashes just outside of Los Angeles, Quincy believes sabotage may caused the major air disaster, but finds proving his suspicion is no easy task(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A tape implicating two senior police officers in a criminal conspiracy is mistakenly delivered to Daley Videos, and Arthur and Terry find themselves placed in contact with its owner - a local major crime boss. Ian McShane, Rula Lenska, Brian Blessed and Ray Winstone guest star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie works alongside an old friend who once saved his life while serving in the SAS, and has difficulty coping with mounting evidence that his ex-colleague has joined the gang of Italian terrorists they are shadowing. Crime drama, starring Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Recently released criminal Eddie Boyse becomes prime suspect in an assault case - and Regan believes he is guilty. Unfortunately for the officer, Boyse has the perfect alibi - he was in Regan's company when the crime was committed. Drama, starring John Thaw, with Dennis Waterman and Del Henney(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Fishing Allstars
programme.desc: Dean Macey and Adam Rooney visit three diverse venues across England. They first target barbel on the River Trent alongside Matt Godfrey, before switching their attention to carp on the Grand Union Canal, and finally teaming up with Tom Dove and Steve Ringer at Earlswood Lake(n)

programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. programme.desc: Private investigator Caroline Selby seeks Arthur's help in locating eccentric recluse and inventor Albert Goddard, who has come into an inheritance. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: The story behind the famous Regent Street toy shop, showing how it has grown from a modest 18th-century establishment to a seven-storey London landmark. The programme examines how it was given a royal warrant in 1938 and survived the Blitz - and how despite an increasing variety of merchandise, its signature teddy bears remain a bestseller. Featuring contributions from former employees(n)

programme.title: Inside Sandringham: Holidaying with the Queen
programme.desc: Documentary charting every detail of the royal family's Christmas celebrations at Sandringham. Run with military precision and steeped in tradition, the film examines what Prince Harry's then-fiancee Meghan Markle has in store as she attends for the first time and the etiquette to which she must adhere. Plus, a look at the rich history of the royal family Christmas, going back to Victorian times. Contributors include royal insiders and cultural historians(n)

programme.title: When Christmas Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Noddy Holder narrates this extended special looking at the unplanned, unwanted but often hilarious moments that have beset the world of TV during the festive season. Festive cock-ups include Christmas trees that won't stand up and kids' toys that won't shut up, via the worst yuletide movie ever and some distinctly misguided TV adverts. Clips feature a host of stars, including Phillip Schofield, Eamonn Holmes and iconic TV chef Fanny Cradock, while things go horribly wrong for Piers Morgan at a Christmas lights switch-on and singer Patti LaBelle forgets the words in front of then-US president Bill Clinton(n)

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers with Alan Davies
programme.desc: The animal welfare series continues as Alan focuses on four very different dogs that underwent incredible transformations. Inspector Nick Wheelhouse is called in deal with three adult mastiffs and nine puppies in north London that are all drastically underweight. In Essex, the rescuers provide the elderly owner of Blue, an overweight whippet, with a new diet and exercise regime that will help him shed the excess pounds. The also catches up with Mavis, one of nine poodles abandoned by the side of the road in Winchester. When they were found, their wet, matted coats accounted for more than 40 per cent of their body weight, but now Mavis regularly goes for grooming and pampering treatments with her owner Sally. programme.title: The Dog Rescuers with Alan Davies

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: The Yorkshire Steam Railway: All Aboard
programme.desc: A summer heatwave brings record numbers to the railway, though joy turns to despair for the staff when it looks like the railway will be prevented from running its iconic steam engines through a tinder-dry national park. Through a series of expensive preventative measures - including hiring in a couple of heritage diesel trains and having a makeshift fire truck follow every engine - boss Chris manages to keep the business running. The engine shed workers are also kept busy trying to get star locomotive Eric steaming again(n)

programme.title: Great British Ships
programme.desc: Rob Bell reveals the secrets of ill-fated liner the Titanic, whose maiden voyage became the most famous maritime disaster in history. In the Belfast shipyard where the Titanic was built, Rob explores how the city took on the daunting challenge of creating such a gigantic ship, and as the tragic story unfolds, he demonstrates why its groundbreaking safety systems ultimately failed, costing the lives of more than 1,500 people(n)

programme.title: Hoarders: Landfill in My Living Room
programme.desc: Documentary series following people with a compulsion to hoard. The first episode features a woman diagnosed with cancer whose home is full of rotten food and dead mice, a father whose relationship with his daughter has suffered as a result of his obsession, and a Huddersfield man whose clutter caught fire, burning his house to the ground(n)

programme.title: Greatest Christmas TV Moments
programme.desc: Countdown of 50 festive crackers past and present, including classic soap moments, dramatic endings, sitcom specials, comedy sketches and light entertainment highlights that have made the television set the focus of the holiday season for decades. Highlights include famous couples Den and Angie, Jack and Vera, and Gavin & Stacey; popular double acts Morecambe and Wise, the Trotter brothers and Wallace and Gromit; Doctor Who meeting Kylie Minogue; perennial music show Top of the Pops; and the ultimate irony of sitting down to watch the Royle Family sit down to watch TV for an hour. All small-screen life is here - with jingle bells on. Featuring interviews with cast, crew and assorted celebrity contributors(n)

programme.title: Time Bandits (1981)
programme.desc: A bemused schoolboy is escorted on a bizarre journey through time by a group of larcenous dwarfs. His adventures lead him to encounters with various characters from history - but none of them are quite what he had imagined. Terry Gilliam's fantasy comedy, starring Craig Warnock, David Rappaport, John Cleese, Michael Palin, Sean Connery, Ian Holm, Ralph Richardson and David Warner(n)

programme.title: White Christmas (1954)
programme.desc: A pair of former soldiers start a new career as nightclub entertainers. They try to boost the popularity of their old commanding officer's struggling winter resort in Vermont by staging a series of extravagant shows, with a little help from their former army buddies and a talented singing sister act. Musical, starring Bing Crosby, Danny Kaye, Vera-Ellen, Dean Jagger, Sig Rumann, Mary Wickes, Anne Whitfield and Rosemary Clooney, featuring seasonal songs by Irving Berlin(n)

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson(n)

programme.title: Now You See Me 2 (2016)
programme.desc: A gang of magicians-turned-criminals is reunited for a comeback performance by a ruthless technology magnate, who se actual goal is to force the team into carrying out a seemingly impossible heist on his behalf. The illusionists realise their only hope of avoiding the law is to perform one last unprecedented stunt to expose the businessman's illegal activities. Crime thriller sequel, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Daniel Radcliffe and Morgan Freeman(n)

programme.title: The Bank Job (2008)
programme.desc: A London car dealer is persuaded by an old flame to rob a bank. The heist goes off without a hitch, leaving the crooks in possession of cash and jewels worth millions - as well as a safety deposit box containing top-secret information the government and security services are determined to keep buried. Fact-based crime thriller, starring Jason Statham and Saffron Burrows(n)

programme.title: 13 Hours: The Secret Soldiers of Benghazi (2016)
programme.desc: A US embassy in Libya comes under attack from extremists, who kill the ambassador. With no help in sight, a small band of CIA security operatives from various military backgrounds takes a stand to fight off the attackers and protect the remaining diplomatic personnel. Fact-based action thriller, starring John Krasinski and James Badge Dale(n)

programme.title: Of Horses and Men (2013)
programme.desc: Five stories seen from the point of view of the characters' horses, including a man and a woman who are secretly in love with each other, a conflict over barbed wire, a mare that yearns to be free of its owner, a sailor tempted to swap his horse for vodka, and a man in search of God. Comedy drama, starring Ingvar Eggert Sigurdsson and Charlotte Boving. In Icelandic, Swedish and English(n)

programme.title: The Comancheros (1961)
programme.desc: A hard-bitten Texas Ranger joins forces with a convict and a gambler in a covert operation to run a gang of gunmen out of the territory for supplying Comanche warriors with arms and alcohol from a secret hideout in Mexico. But after infiltrating the renegades' secret camp, they have to figure out how to survive until help arrives. Western, with John Wayne, Stuart Whitman, Ina Balin, Nehemiah Persoff and Lee Marvin(n)

programme.title: Imitation of Life (1959)
programme.desc: A homeless black woman moves in with a struggling actress and works as her maid in return for a place to stay. But both women struggle to cope with their unruly daughters - the aspiring star has neglected hers in pursuit of fame, while the maid's resentful mixed-race child is ashamed of her ethnicity. Drama, starring Lana Turner, Juanita Moore, John Gavin and Sandra Dee, with a cameo appearance by gospel singer Mahalia Jackson(n)

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth (1959)
programme.desc: An explorer discovers a prehistoric monster-infested world deep beneath Earth's crust and faces a tough ordeal escaping the predatory attacks of the creatures as he tries to guide his team back to safety. Sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novel, starring Pat Boone, James Mason, Arlene Dahl and Diane Baker(n)

programme.title: A Beautiful Mind (2001)
programme.desc: Biopic of the brilliant American mathematician John Nash, whose prospects of a promising career with the CIA were confounded by paranoid delusions and schizophrenia as the stress of the job proved too much of a burden. Drama, starring Russell Crowe, Jennifer Connelly, Ed Harris, Judd Hirsch, Paul Bettany and Christopher Plummer(n)

programme.title: Taken (2008)

However, what the kidnappers do not realise is that the girl's father is a former CIA agent, who employs all his old skills as he searches for the criminals and tries to rescue his daughter. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Famke Janssen and Maggie Grace(n)

programme.desc: A poor teenager leaves home and hits the road with a crew of magazine sellers. She gets caught up in a whirlwind of hard partying, law bending and young love while crossing the Midwest United States. Drama, starring Sasha Lane, Shia LaBeouf and Riley Keough(n)

programme.title: Our Idiot Brother (2011)
programme.desc: A naive marijuana grower is released from prison to find his girlfriend has thrown him out of their farm. He turns to his three sisters for help, and as each takes a turn at giving him a place to stay, she finds her stable life thrown into chaos. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Elizabeth Banks, Zooey Deschanel and Emily Mortimer(n)

programme.title: Arabesque (1966)
programme.desc: An American professor working at Oxford University is hired by a mysterious Arabic businessman to decipher some ancient hieroglyphics. When he learns they contain a message linked to a planned political assassination, he is drawn into a series of escapades with his employer's henchmen in hot pursuit. Spy thriller, starring Gregory Peck, Sophia Loren, Alan Badel and Kieron Moore(n)

programme.title: Man in the Saddle (1951)
programme.desc: A wealthy and ambitious cattleman plans to seize all the land surrounding his own. A peaceful rancher living nearby ignores warnings to sell up and avoid a conflict, and as he suffers a campaign of intimidation, he is forced to adopt violent methods to defend his livelihood. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Alexander Knox, Joan Leslie and Ellen Drew(n)

programme.title: The Return of the Musketeers (1989)
programme.desc: D'Artagnan reunites his former companions to save the queen of France from the scheming Cardinal Mazarin, and embark on a mission to England to prevent the beheading of Charles I. Meanwhile, the daughter of a former vanquished enemy is seeking revenge on the four heroes. Swashbuckling adventure sequel, with Oliver Reed, Michael York, Frank Finlay, Richard Chamberlain, Kim Cattrall and Roy Kinnear, who died during filming(n)

programme.title: The Man from the Alamo (1953)

He tries to clear his name with acts of heroism, including tracking down the traitor who robbed the casualties after the battle was over. Western, starring Glenn Ford and Julia Adams(n)

They are sent into occupied Europe to recover priceless works of art that have fallen into Nazi hands and ensure the masterpieces survive the conflict. Fact-based drama, directed by and starring George Clooney. With Matt Damon, Bill Murray and Cate Blanchett(n)

Action adventure sequel, starring Bruce Willis and Jai Courtney(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.desc: The guys' science skills are put to the test when they get a flat tyre during Leonard's surprise bachelor party weekend in Mexico. Meanwhile, the girls finally force Penny to break the news to her family that she has eloped with Leonard. Keith Carradine guest stars(n)

Howard and Bernadette fall out over plans to renovate his childhood home. Wil Wheaton, Adam Nimoy and Stephen Merchant guest star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy has a date with a mystery man, so Sheldon asks Howard and Raj to help him find a new girlfriend online. When Amy is coy with the details about the guy she's dating, Penny and Bernadette decide to spy on them. Stephen Merchant guest stars(n)

programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try hanging out as friends when they spend Thanksgiving together at the aquarium. Howard reluctantly agrees to volunteer at a soup kitchen with Bernadette, Raj and Emily. Meanwhile, Penny discovers that Leonard knows more about her than she thought(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle enlists Peralta's help in tracking down his son's favourite toy for Christmas, but they find themselves accidentally facing off against a Latvian crime ring as a result. Back at the precinct, the team members get ready for the annual Christmas carol competition against their rivals at the Metropolitan Transit Authority. Mary Lynn Rajskub guest stars(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. A prison van crash sees a mass escape of convicts take place and the entire squad has to track the villains down. Former American football star Marshawn Lynch guests(n)

Only one fugitive remains on the loose on the streets of Brooklyn after the mass escape of convicts from the prison van and Peralta is forced to enlist a surprising ally in order to apprehend him. Elsewhere, Santiago and Gina attempt to introduce Boyle to proper texting etiquette. Craig Robinson guest stars(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cop comedy returns after a mid-season break. When one of the precincts in the area must be closed, an evaluation process takes place. The squad is confident about its assessment - until it turns out the auditor is Santiago's ex-boyfriend Teddy(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A burglary on the set of a TV detective show distracts Peralta and Diaz from the precinct's on-going evaluation. As the rest of the squad concentrate on the task in hand and a new auditor takes over, Peralta finds himself charmed by the glamour of showbusiness(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz tries to soothe Jeffords' ego after a professional setback. Meanwhile, Santiago spends some precious time with Captain Holt. Crime comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords wants to file an official complaint against a fellow police officer who stops him in his own neighbourhood while he is off duty, but Captain Holt has other ideas. Peralta and Santiago glimpse the difficulties of parenthood when they babysit for Jeffords' children(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel decide they will live as self-sufficiently as they can while restoring the chateau, and invest in some chickens to provide them with eggs for breakfast every morning. However, they still have countless problems to deal with, and have only £20,000 left to spend on the project. The chateau is still without either heating or water, while the 59 windows are crumbling. While Dick's renovations fall behind schedule, Angel is in her element coming up with ideas for what the finished building will look like(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The penultimate day in and around Guildford, Surrey, sees children's entertainments manager David playing host. Is he forgetting the key ingredients of a dinner party?(n)

programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates the sugar tax, and finds out how manufacturers have responded by reducing the sugar in some of our favourite brands, asking what exactly they are adding to keep the flavours the same. programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Mark Genders welcomes the contestants to the Five Bells Pub in Berkshire and hopes they will approve of his small but perfectly formed rooms. programme.title: Four in a Bed

Marianne and Fran from Langsmeade House begin by explaining that their worn rug is in fact a 200-year-old antique, Natasha and Dal from Stratford House confront Michael and Lorna about their strong language and cleaning techniques, while Mark Genders compares his experience at Edmund House to flying with a low budget airline(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Taxi driver Nik Christides hosts the first party in east Hampshire, where one guest causes a stir by revealing details of a romantic encounter with Boyzone singer Ronan Keating. programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Cameras return to Chester Zoo, where Visayan warty pig Wendy is fed up with the attentions of male pig Jake, and decides to escape. Meanwhile, young giraffe Narus has been battling with other young males in the herd, so the keepers think that it's time to move him to a new zoo. Which is easier said than done(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: A festive special in which the architect revisits some of the series' small-build projects. He catches up with expert designer William to look back on his project to transform a 1970s caravan into a holiday retreat, and meets the couple who invested their life savings in the conversion of an old bus. Plus, the disused underground toilet turned into an apartment, the office inside a shipping container, and Christmas-themed builds including a gingerbread house and a beach-hut advent calendar(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline
programme.desc: Paramedic Rob Armstrong fights to save the life of a truck driver who is having a heart attack, while Paul Johnson and Alex Flashwood treat a woman they believe is having a stroke(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree continue their renovation of a French chateau, 18 months after the end of the first series. So far, only nine rooms have been renovated and many areas of the 12-acre estate have yet to be looked at - but the project is going to have to start paying for itself soon. They make plans to host weddings on the grounds, while looking ahead to keeping livestock and growing their own crops. Dick takes steps to generate solar power during a hot summer, and turns an old oil tank into a pig roaster(n)

programme.title: Nazi War Machines: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: James Holland examines Nazi Germany's U-boat fleet, revealing how Hitler's failure to understand maritime warfare held the key to the outcome of the Second World War(n)

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures: Russia's War
programme.desc: A look at how the Nazis faced a vast Soviet army bent on revenge, battling for every inch of ground from the Baltic all the way back to the heart of Berlin(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Lewis, 18, is rushed into the hospital after coming off his motorbike and colliding with two cars. He is immediately taken for a full body CT scan as doctors are concerned about the extent of the injuries to his pelvis, arm and head. Meanwhile, 27-year-old Sam awaits X-ray results after he fainted and cut his lip while smoking a Cuban cigar at a barbecue(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock is joined by Liza Tarbuck to battle guest captain Sarah Millican and team-mate Romesh Ranganathan as Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel quiz show mash-up. Susie Dent is ably assisted by Phill Jupitus in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley deals with the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: Nazi War Machines: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: James Holland examines Nazi Germany's U-boat fleet, revealing how Hitler's failure to understand maritime warfare held the key to the outcome of the Second World War(n)

programme.title: Vet on the Hill
programme.desc: Scott Miller heads to Cornwall to help rescue seal pups stranded along the coastline, and performs a risky operation on a rook with a broken wing(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates the popular belief that coffee can sober people up and also looks into new research linking consumption of the beverage and a reduced risk of liver disease. In San Francisco, Kate Quilton investigates trendy new drink kombucha, while Matt Tebbutt examines why supermarket labels don't say which cut of beef thin-cut steaks come from(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty sets out to learn how kippers are produced, and finds out why this nutritious smoked fish is no longer a breakfast favourite. Kate Quilton is in Germany to investigate gherkins, discovering a space-age machine that can pickle food in seconds. Matt Tebbutt and Helen Lawal try to discover why rice cakes are white when they are made of brown rice(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Recently retired Alan and Jackie Patrick from Hampshire are keen to buy a property on the north of Spain's Costa Blanca in the Marina Alta region, close to where Jackie's brothers live. Ben Hillman show them a range of properties for their £85,000 budget, but will any character town houses have them reaching for their chequebook?(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Farzana Kausar from Stockport, Greater Manchester, is looking for a better quality of life in the Spanish sun. Her daughter Aisha, who uses a wheelchair, is also making the full-time move. With a budget of £120,000 for the property and any alterations they'll need to make for Aisha, Laura Hamilton shows them five homes around Torrevieja on the Costa Blanca(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Trecarne House in Liskeard, Cornwall, where owners Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan hope to demonstrate that their B&B offers the best value for money. The pair win the group's admiration by sharing their life story, but one guest stirs up intrigue by holding his cards close to his chest(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners spend their second night of the competition at the Magna Carta at Windsor in Berkshire, a five-star floating bed and breakfast run by Captain Dominic Read. The guests are pleasantly surprised upon arrival, but not all are impressed by the standard of the accommodation - and a cracked teapot at the breakfast table leads to trouble for the proprietor(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third B&B of the week is Ash Cottage near Leeds Castle in Kent, where the unusual decor is an eye-opener for the guests but is not everyone's cup of tea. Trish and Tom get heated over the instant coffee before owners Rayne and Chris Deal take their fellow contestants to Chatham Dockyard to try their hands at rope-making(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final guest house of the week is A Room with a View in Brighton, where owner Stephen Bull and housekeeper Joanna Harris hope their nine-room establishment will impress the contestants. Things get off to a good start when Rayne and Chris Deal are impressed by the cleanliness of the property, but things take a turn for the worse when breakfast gets the thumbs down(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners come together to confront their critics face-to-face. Hosts of Trecarne House in Cornwall Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan raise issues with Magna Carta's Dominic Read on his mark for their hosting, while he has a bone to pick with them over criticism of his five-star floating B&B. Stephen and Joanna of A Room with a View in Brighton receive complaints about their breakfast, and tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Five cooks compete for the £1,000 prize in Kingston upon Thames, south-west London, and keen basketball player Ken Oputa is the first to host, inviting his guests to turn up in sportswear fancy dress. He hopes his Double Dribble mushrooms and Slam Dunk salmon will prove to be winning ingredients(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Interior designer Erika Sager hosts the second dinner party of the week on board her boat in Kingston upon Thames, south-west London, and invites her guests to dress up as pirates. Despite the unconventional setting, her rivals are all impressed by the standard of her food and hospitality(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mother-of-two Sarah Brice hosts the third dinner party in Kingston upon Thames, hoping to impress her guests with her own take on dishes including prawns, lamb and chocolate mousse. Ken Oputa tries to make an impression on the female contestants with his romantic poetry, but finds Erika Sager switches her attentions to his rival Jamie Baker(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Photographer Jamie Baker hosts the fourth party in London, and his ambitious menu of langoustine and crab ravioli, herb crusted rack of lamb, and milloux of chocolate - combined with his choice of evening entertainment - go down well, until an unexpected turn of events scuppers his plans(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired golfer David Witcher hosts the final evening in Kingston upon Thames, south-west London, and hopes to impress with an American-themed menu, including Wyoming slow-cooked ribs and Louisiana seafood chowder. After dinner, he entertains his guests with a bucking bronco, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Elderly cheetah Matrah is ostracised by his brothers Burba and Singha when he starts to show signs of a leg injury. Cameras also follow Chester Zoo's Sumatran orangutans, including adolescent female Tuti and four-month-old Kesuma. And there's also a look at Asian pond turtle Shrek, whose love life proved fatal for a previous mate(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In this festive special, the architect visits a man-made stalactite crystal grotto in Surrey, and meets a small-spaces enthusiast who has rebuilt and renovated a Victorian flat-pack tin chapel in Shropshire to create a magical holiday home. He also catches up with carpenter Adam, who created a double-decker bus holiday home on the Brighton coastline, Jay and Jonathan at their ambulance-turned-campervan in Norfolk, and Barry at his hexagonal home in Lancashire(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline
programme.desc: Natalka Greenwood and Sam Watson treat a 10-year-old autistic boy who has injured his back on a trampoline. Emma Snelson and Lizzie Hobday rush to a baby who has stopped breathing(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Fresh from the success of hosting a three-day wedding at the chateau, Dick and Angel make business plans for the grounds, intending to charge people to fish in the moat and forage in the woods. Angel starts work on a second guest suite, but also wants to install an elevator, which pushes Dick's engineering skills to the limit(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: A look back at the transformation of Dick Strawbridge and his wife Angel's 45-room chateau from an abandoned ruin into a sumptuous family home. This episode looks back at how the abandoned walled garden stole Dick and Angel's hearts and how the family members fell for the country lifestyle, with their children growing up learning about seasons, livestock and wildlife(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition of the documentary features stories of human compassion and kindness in the most challenging circumstances. Allen, 82, has injured his chest after a dizzy spell caused him to fall down 13 steps. As son Graham waits nervously for doctors to assess Allen's injuries, Graham describes his dad's strength and resilience in carrying the family through dark times, and how precious the bond between father and son can be(n)

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: Emergency services in Stamford, Connecticut, tell the horrific story of how Travis the chimpanzee became the centre of a shocking and brutal attack that would change lives forever(n)

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Cops UK: Bodycam Squad
programme.desc: Keith engages in a high-speed pursuit after spotting a car being driven with a flat tyre. Even after the tyre disintegrates at 90mph, the driver still refuses to stop(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May take a continental trip in their favourite supercars - the Ford GT, Ferrari F430 and Pagani Zonda. programme.desc: The team at King's Haulage deal with the UK's largest bronze sculpture when it berths at Plymouth Docks, while the race is on to deliver a herd of Lego dinosaurs to Marwell Zoo(n)

programme.title: Mega Air
